channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Microsoft 365 Copilot incorpora nuevos agentes de IA y automatiza tareas para mejorar flujos de trabajo
item.description: El gigante de Redmond, aprovechando el altavoz de su cita anual Microsoft Ignite 2024, ha anunciado nuevas funcionalidades en su cartera de soluciones.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Smart Press Shop, la ‘fábrica digital como servicio’ que lleva las operaciones de producción de Porsche y Schuler al siguiente nivel
item.description: Contar con una fábrica digitalizada es uno de los requisitos fundamentes para tener ventajas competitivas en el mercado.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Class action lawsuit on AI-related discrimination reaches final settlement
item.description: A federal judge has signed off on a settlement agreement Wednesday in a class action lawsuit alleging that an algorithm designed to score rental applicants discriminated on the basis of race and income.
item.dc:creator: Jesse Bedayn, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Nvidia is Wall Street's most valuable company. How it got there, by the numbers
item.description: Nvidia has once again turned out quarterly results that exceeded Wall Street's forecasts. The company has seen soaring demand for its semiconductors, which are used to power artificial intelligence applications.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: US gathers allies to talk AI safety as Trump's vow to undo Biden's AI policy overshadows their work
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — President-elect Donald Trump has vowed to repeal President Joe Biden's signature artificial intelligence policy when he returns to the White House for a second term. What that actually means for the future of AI technology remains to be seen.
item.dc:creator: MATT O'BRIEN and BARBARA ORTUTAY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Meta's Threads app launches custom feeds amid Bluesky surge
item.description: The rollout came just days after Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg announced last week that Threads was testing the new feature.
item.dc:creator: Miranda Nazzaro, NewsNation

item.title: What to know about OpenAI’s new, free AI training course
item.description: OpenAI and nonprofit partner Common Sense Media have launched a free training course for teachers aimed at demystifying artificial intelligence and prompt engineering, the organizations said on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: Nvidia beats earnings expectations as investors eye demand for Blackwell AI chips
item.description: Nvidia has reported a surge in third-quarter profit and sales as demand for its specialized computer chips that power artificial intelligence systems remains robust.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Parvini, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Cisco: Pressure to deploy AI is up, but only 13% feel ready
item.description: Pressure to implement AI plans is on the rise, but the readiness of enterprise networks to handle AI workloads has actually declined over the past year, according to new research from Cisco.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: DoD, Hill eye CMMC tax credit for smaller defense contractors
item.description: The CMMC tax credit would be available to companies with 50 or fewer employees. The bill could feature in negotiations over tax cuts next year. The post DoD, Hill eye CMMC tax credit for smaller defense contractors first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: The Rise of Selector AI: Revolutionizing Network Operations with AI-Powered Solutions
item.description: Selector AI is revolutionizing network operations with its AI-powered solutions, bringing data-driven decision making to non-hyperscaler companies.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: News influencers are overwhelmingly male. No wonder there’s a Republican bias
item.description: “News influencers” are social media translators, conveying the day’s biggest stories via TikTok commentary or Instagram graphic. They also happen to be overwhelmingly male. As trust in mainstream media lingers at an all-time low, many are turning to social media apps for their news.
item.dc:creator: Henry Chandonnet, Fast Company

item.title: Australia won't force social media users to share their personal details when child ban takes effect
item.description: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) — Australia's communications minister said Wednesday the government won't force social media users to hand over their personal information to tech companies, as children younger than 16 are set to be banned from the platforms.
item.dc:creator: ROD McGUIRK, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: La IA generativa redefine la educación secundaria; así es GenAI4ED
item.description: El pasado mes de octubre arrancaba el proyecto GenAI4ED, una iniciativa internacional financiada a cargo de Horizonte Europa que cuenta con la participación de IMDEA Networks.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Microsoft partners with industry leaders to offer vertical SLMs
item.description: At its Microsoft Ignite 2024 show in Chicago this week, Microsoft and industry partner experts showed off the power of small language models (SLMs) with a new set of fine-tuned, pre-trained AI models using industry-specific data.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Elon Musk’s DOGE agency may launch a mobile app to file your taxes
item.description: Elon Musk and Vivek Ramaswamy’s Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) doesn’t have a staff yet and won’t technically exist for another two months, but the two are already reportedly looking at substantial changes to the government’s status quo.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Microsoft unveils imaging APIs for Windows Copilot Runtime
item.description: Microsoft’s Windows Copilot Runtime, which allows developers to integrate AI capabilities into Windows, is being fitted with AI-backed APIs for image processing. It will also gain access to Phi 3.5 Silica, a custom-built generative AI model for Copilot+ PCs.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Microsoft pitches AI 'agents' that can perform tasks on their own at Ignite 2024
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Microsoft CEO Satya Nadella told customers at a conference in Chicago on Tuesday that the company is teaching a new set of artificial intelligence tools how to "act on our behalf across our work and life.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Forget driverless cars. One company wants autonomous helicopters to spray crops and fight fires
item.description: HENNIKER, N.H. (AP) — When Hector Xu was learning to fly a helicopter in college, he recalled having a few “nasty experiences” while trying to navigate at night.
item.dc:creator: MICHAEL CASEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: A beautiful machine: one week with an M4 Pro MacBook Pro
item.description: The new MacBook Pro is everything you expect: faster, better and more capable than before. While you can say that about every new Mac, the move to Apple Silicon means Apple can introduce vastly improved systems almost every year — something that was not always possible before.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Microsoft adds major upgrades to Power Apps at Ignite
item.description: At Microsoft Ignite 2024, which began Tuesday in Chicago, the company announced a series of low-code product enhancements, targeted at developers, that ranged from new capabilities in Power Apps and Power Pages to new AI and governance features in the codeless automation tool Microsoft Power Automat
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: DOJ seeks historic action against Google, proposes force-sale of Chrome
item.description: The US Department of Justice (DOJ) is intensifying its antitrust actions against Google, proposing a historic move that could reshape the tech landscape.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Company affiliated with Alex Jones seeks to disqualify The Onion's auction bid on Infowars
item.description: A company affiliated with conspiracy theorist Alex Jones asked a federal judge on Monday to disqualify a bid by the satirical news outlet The Onion to buy Jones' Infowars at a bankruptcy auction, alleging fraud and collusion.
item.dc:creator: DAVE COLLINS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Judge tosses Huckabee lawsuit against Meta over ads suggesting he endorsed marijuana gummies
item.description: WILMINGTON, Del. (AP) — A federal judge in Delaware on Monday dismissed a lawsuit filed by former Arkansas Gov. Mike Huckabee against social media giant Meta over advertisements using his name and image to sell CBD products.
item.dc:creator: RANDALL CHASE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Designing the APIs that accidentally power businesses
item.description: In the last decade, every web application developer has become an API designer. But most organizations do not think of developers as API designers, nor do they think about APIs as a product of design — to the detriment of their developers’ productivity.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: New Chinese humanoid robot shows off its strength by lifting 35 pounds per hand
item.description: China's Shanghai Kepler Robotics has developed a new humanoid robot that can carry up to 35 pounds per hand for commercial applications across various industries
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: T-Mobile hacked in massive Chinese cyber-espionage: Wall St. Journal
item.description: It was part of a campaign to spy on the phones of high-value intelligence targets, the Journal reports.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation

item.title: One Tech Tip: Replacing passwords with passkeys for an easier login experience
item.description: LONDON (AP) — If you're tired of memorizing passwords, then give passkeys a try. You might have noticed that many online services are now offering the option of using passkeys, a digital authentication method touted as an easier and more secure way to log in.
item.dc:creator: KELVIN CHAN, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News
